---
title: Terraform / OpenTofu Evidence Adapter ‚Äî Adapter Validation Suite
doc-type: avs
adapter-id: terraform
adapter-class: modernization
mission-class: integration
status: reserved
phase: phase-planning
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: canon/modernization-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao-core/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-04-16'
---

# Terraform / OpenTofu Evidence Adapter ‚Äî Adapter Validation Suite

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `reserved` ¬∑ **Class:** `modernization` ¬∑ **Mission:** `integration` ¬∑ **Phase:** `phase-planning`

**Canon source:** `canon/modernization-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold ‚Äî awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO ‚Äî ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

_TODO ‚Äî Author an overview of the Terraform / OpenTofu Evidence Adapter adapter's role in the UIAO governance perimeter. Do not contradict canon. Cross-reference the companion ATS document where relevant._

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `terraform-state`, `terraform-plan`, `hcl-configuration`

_TODO ‚Äî Expand scope with concrete boundaries: what the adapter reads, what it emits, what it explicitly does not touch._

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `CM-2`, `CM-3`, `CM-6`, `CM-8`, `CA-7`

_TODO ‚Äî For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `python-3.12` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `github-hosted` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `baseline` |
| Retention | `3` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

Status transitions `reserved` ‚Üí `active` when the adapter ships in uiao-impl (separate PR gated on this registry entry landing, per `uiao-impl/.claude/rules/canon-consumer.md`). Proposed adapter surface: `extract_terraform_state`, `parse_hcl_config`, `consume_terraform_plan`, `detect_terraform_drift`, `generate_terraform_evidence` ‚Äî layered on the seven canonical domains of `DatabaseAdapterBase`.

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003
- https://www.terraform.io
- https://opentofu.org

---

*Generated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` ¬ß4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*
